description: Composition Violet sleeveless kurta made of 100% cotton, has a boat neck with stitch detailing, contrast colour grunge print on the bottom hemline and slit side hems Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron This piece of art by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and pumps for a casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtis Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
